self_improvement.guidelines:
🧭 SELF-IMPROVEMENT GUIDELINES | 2026-06-27T12:22:28.776242
Combined win rate: 15.6% (buffer=10.5%, returns=20.7%)
• Win rate below 40%: tighten SCALP_STOP_ATR_MULTIPLIER and SCALP_TP_ATR_MULTIPLIER
• Reduce SCAN_INTERVAL_SECONDS to avoid overtrading
• Lower MAX_TRADE_SIZE_USD to preserve capital
• Add 5-min confirmation before entry to filter noise
• Commander guidance (recent):
  - Hi
  - ping - are you there ?
  - Hi
  - Hi
• Recommended parameter adjustments:
  - SCALP_STOP_ATR_MULTIPLIER: 0.5760000000000001 -> 0.4608000000000001 (reason: tighten stops when WR low; widen when WR strong)
  - SCALP_TP_ATR_MULTIPLIER: 1.215 -> 1.0935000000000001 (reason: increase targets when WR strong; reduce when WR weak)
  - SCAN_INTERVAL_SECONDS: 51 -> 66.3 (reason: reduce frequency when WR low; increase when WR strong)
  - MAX_TRADE_SIZE_USD: 22277.843875 -> 15594.490712499997 (reason: reduce size when WR poor; increase when WR strong)
  - MAX_RISK_PER_TRADE_USD: 140625.0 -> 105468.75 (reason: tighten per-trade risk when WR low; relax slightly when WR strong)
  - CONFIDENCE_THRESHOLD: 0.7500000000000001 -> 0.8000000000000002 (reason: raise entry bar when WR low; lower when WR strong)

SCALP_STOP_ATR_MULTIPLIER.reason: tighten stops when WR low; widen when WR strong

SCALP_TP_ATR_MULTIPLIER.reason: increase targets when WR strong; reduce when WR weak

MAX_TRADE_SIZE_USD.reason: reduce size when WR poor; increase when WR strong
